Published on March 4, 2026

Quick Summary

After testing 12+ weight management cat foods, here are our top picks for 2026:

🏆 Top Pick: Hill's Science Diet Perfect Weight

Rating: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.8/5

Best for: Clinical weight loss

Price: $49.99 for 15.5lbs

Is Your Cat Overweight?

Signs:

  • Ribs hard to feel
  • No visible waist
  • Abdominal pouch

Top Picks

1. Hill’s Science Diet Perfect Weight - Best Overall

Pros: Clinically proven, high fiber

Cons: Premium price

FAQ

How much weight should a cat lose?

Safe loss: 0.5-2% of body weight per week.

How long does weight loss take?

Most cats lose weight in 2-4 months.
